article.title: Uber vs Servicenow
article.content:
Location - India

Experience: ~6 years
Current Compensation - 24LPA(Fixed) , 30LPA(CTC)

**Service Now Offer : SSE**

Base - 35LPA (excluding PF)
Variable - 3.5LPA
Stocks - 40K USD vested over 4 years

CTC - 49.5LPA

**Uber offer: L4 SDE2 - Frontend**

Base - 45LPA (excluding PF)
Variable - 7LPA
Stocks - 50K USD vested over 4 years

CTC - 65LPA

Uber pays more clearly but heard mixed reviews about work life balance. What's the right option to pick considering all aspects?

Also, can I negotiate further with Uber? I haven't negotiated with service now yet with Uber's offer.

post.content: With 6 years you should have got L5 but its ok. Choose Uber for better brand and solid engineering culture. Spend there atleast a year. Work life balance stuff should be your personal call.
Can you share the interview experience for Uber and servicenow
you can push stocks easily till 50k USD
See what kind of work you get to do in each then decide. I would prefer Uber
Did you get offer letter from Uber?
